name: IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_VL
query: SELECT IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.ELEMENT_ID, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.ELEMENT_NUMBER, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.PARENT_ELEMENT_NUMBER, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.ELEMENT_TYPE, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.CREATED_BY, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.CREATION_DATE, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.ELEMENT_ORDER, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_TL.CONTENT FROM IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B, IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_TL WHERE IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_B.ELEMENT_ID = IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_TL.ELEMENT_ID AND IRC_CC_ELEMENTS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
